scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The audited platform-runtime boundary adds five project runtime class_name scripts, changing the project runtime class count from 128 to 133. A detached clean-HEAD control run with the same Godot 4.7.1 retained ObjectDB=263 and Resources=116 across all 203 prior tests; the new 212-test suite requires ObjectDB=267 and Resources=118, with no RID allocation growth. The pinned GF 8.1.0 vendor snapshot is unchanged.
